title: Introduction to Computing Sciences
description: Brief history of computing. Description of the basic components of a computer/computing device. Input/Output devices and peripherals. Hardware, software and human ware. Diverse and growing computer/digital applications. Information processing and its roles in society. The Internet, its applications and its impact on the world today. The different areas/programs of the computing discipline. The job specializations for computing professionals. The future of computing.

quizzes.text: What are the three main components of a computing system?
Which device is classified as an output peripheral?
What does 'Information Processing' primarily refer to?
options: Converting raw data into useful information

quizzes.text: The Internet's most significant impact on modern society is:
Which of the following is NOT a computing discipline area?
